final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for UGREEN NAS brand 618 anniversary celebration e-commerce announcement.

Style/medium: clean commercial e-commerce poster, modern tech brand aesthetic with celebratory energy
Composition: centered hero layout with product focal point, balanced text hierarchy, generous negative space
Subject: UGREEN NAS (network attached storage) device as hero product, sleek minimalist tech design
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient or soft geometric background suggesting cloud/data flow, subtle confetti or celebration elements
Lighting/mood: soft studio lighting with product highlights, energetic and trustworthy mood for shopping festival
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as primary anchor, white and light gray for breathing room, gold or orange accent for 618 celebration
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动"
Constraints: must work as both web banner and mobile crop; text must remain legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: cluttered layout; generic stock photo feel; overused tech tropes like circuit boards; watermarks; busy patterns competing with product
